title: selaginella didymostachya
intro: Selaginella didymostachya, also known as Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Selaginella didymostachya can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide numerous health benefits.
